title: S3 Buckets with for_each
description: Write a Terraform config that uses for_each to create multiple S3 buckets from a set, with a data source for the current AWS region.
starterCode:
# Write a Terraform configuration that:
# 1. Uses data source 'aws_region' (current) to get the current region
# 2. Creates aws_s3_bucket resources using for_each over a set:
#    toset(["logs", "backups", "artifacts"])
# 3. Names each bucket: "myapp-${each.key}-${data.aws_region.current.name}"
# 4. Adds tags with Name = each.key and ManagedBy = "Terraform"
# 5. Outputs a map of bucket names using a for expression

# Data source for current region

# S3 buckets using for_each

# Output: map of bucket_name => bucket ARN
hints: for_each with toset() uses each.key (no each.value for sets)
for expression in output: { for k, v in resource : k => v.attribute }

validationRules.errorMessage: Add a data source for the current AWS region
Use for_each to create multiple S3 buckets
Use toset() to convert the list to a set for for_each
Reference the current item with each.key
Add an output showing bucket ARNs

simulatedOutput.success:
data.aws_region.current: Reading...
data.aws_region.current: Read complete after 0s [id=us-east-1]

Terraform will perform the following actions:
  + aws_s3_bucket.app["artifacts"] will be created
  + aws_s3_bucket.app["backups"] will be created
  + aws_s3_bucket.app["logs"] will be created

Plan: 3 to add, 0 to change, 0 to destroy.

Outputs:
  bucket_arns = {
    artifacts = "arn:aws:s3:::myapp-artifacts-us-east-1"
    backups   = "arn:aws:s3:::myapp-backups-us-east-1"
    logs      = "arn:aws:s3:::myapp-logs-us-east-1"
  }
simulatedOutput.failure: Configuration error. Check data source syntax, for_each with toset(), each.key usage, and output for expression.
